en: I think you're a little confused Wrong I'm not the one who's confused You

en: don't even know who you are Oh and I suppose you know Sure do You're Mufasa's boy

ko: 내 아버지를 알아? 정정. 네 아버지를 알지.

but he died a long time ago Nope Wrong again
ko: 아주 오래전에 돌아가셨어. 아니 또 틀렸어.

en: He's alive And I show him to you You follow old Rafiki He knows the way Come
ko: 살아계셔. 보여줄게. 늙은 라피키를 따라와. 길을 아니까. 자

ko: 서둘러! 잠깐 잠깐 잠깐! 자 자! 어서!
